title: Running Pods on Only Some Nodes — Running Pods on only some Nodes
text:
Imagine that you want to run a
DaemonSet
, but you only need to run those daemon pods
on nodes that have local solid state (SSD) storage. For example, the Pod might provide cache service to the
node, and the cache is only useful when low-latency local storage is available.

Add the label
ssd=true
to the nodes which have SSDs.
kubectl label nodes example-node-1 example-node-2
ssd
=
true
